title: hieracium scardicum subsp. scardicum
intro: Hieracium scardicum subsp. scardicum, also known as Scardian Hawkweed, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Balkan Peninsula, specifically in the mountainous regions of North Macedonia and Albania. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its flavonoid and sesquiterpene content, which contribute to its therapeutic potential. The health benefits of Hieracium scardicum subsp. scardicum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it potentially useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress-related diseases. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
